content:
#improvement #claude-code

# use script when card pulled the done

Auto-merge branch via confirmation modal when card dragged to Done column. — 2026-03-27

i would like to pull the card to done column using board, then script will execute, the merge will be handled. So instead of using /personal-kanban done <card-id>.

when i pull the card, first i need also the confirmation to continue!
